dialog.stepLabel: Lingyang: "Oh my, how did I leave such an important thing behind......"

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Oh my, how did I leave such an important thing behind...

options.text: I was worried the Qixing Drum could be too loud...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Whoa, {PlayerName}?! Why-why are you here?

options.text: No idea. My feet took me here.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: R-really? Me too! What a coincidence, ahahaha...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Have you heard? Bei Shi's team just found some traces left by the Jingle Beast. What a surprise!

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: By the way, where did you learn that from?

options.text: From the Lucky Greetings Collection we found in a tree hole.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Really? How strange! Someone must have forgotten it there!

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: I mean... The Jingle Beast, learning how to do Lucky Greetings? Who could have thought...

options.text: Yeah. Why would it do that?

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Me? Uh, I have no idea...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Maybe it just wanted to make people happy. Wanted to blend in...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: After all, everyone likes the Lucky Greetings, right? Ahahaha...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: One day, these weird spores suddenly showed up in the Dim Forest, after the Lament hit.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: They turned the once peaceful forest into a deadly wasteland, and many of the forest's inhabitants had to flee their home.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: I've been trying to clean up the forest, but I couldn't do it on my own...

options.text: I got the situation dealt with.
Well, I heard the forest is clean now?

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Really?! {PlayerName}, how did you do that? I can't believe it... You just did something I've been dreaming of doing every day... You're so cool!

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Thank you, {PlayerName}! The forest and I will never forget your help!

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Yeah! I wonder who cleaned up the forest... They must be a very amazing person...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: If I ever get the chance, I must thank them properly in person. The forest and I will never forget their help.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: If this is really the place where the Jingle Beast used to live... Maybe it put up the first Moon Lantern here?

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Perhaps, after being stuck in the dark for so long, even the Jingle Beast would want some light...

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Even if it's just a little bit of artificial moonlight... It would have made it feel less lonely.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Yeah, indeed.

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: I'm sure it's no longer feeling lonely... Not anymore.
